product_highlights: Film former and polymer specialist with extensive long-wear expertise
Silicone and non-silicone film forming systems for diverse formulation needs
Viscosity builders providing texture and suspension functionality

notes: US-based specialty polymer and film former supplier with deep expertise in long-wear cosmetic formulations. Presperse offers both silicone-based and silicone-free film forming systems, making them suitable for conventional and clean beauty formulations. Their viscosity builders, suspension polymers, and sensory modifier systems are widely used in color cosmetics, foundations, and long-wear skincare products.
